raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a latte for {$8.00} from : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, IL XXXX I've been in contact with their accounting department at : XXXX A service charge of {$810.00} was added to the coffee so that the purchase price was exactly {$820.00}. I've asked XXXX to credit the service charge as it was an obvious error, or worse, potentially fraudulent. I also submitted a dispute with American Express but they have sided with the hotel after a receipt for {$820.00} was provided. I expected American Express to assist me in questioning the service charge for {$810.00} but they have not been helpful. 

I'd appreciate your assistance. Thank you in advance!
